items.title: Israel strikes Beirut Dahieh — first strike since June 3 ceasefire renewal; 2 killed, 11 wounded; retaliation for Hezbollah fighter drone
Iran fires at least 10 ballistic missiles at Ramat David Airbase — first direct Iran-to-Israel attack since April 8 ceasefire (60 days); all intercepted
Trump tells Netanyahu not to retaliate: 'I call the shots. I call all the shots.' — says US-Iran deal 'very close'
Iranian official: deal with Trump 'no longer feasible at this stage' — blames Beirut strike; FM calls it 'self-defense'
Oil prices spike: Brent +3.6% to $96.47, WTI near $94 — Iran-Israel missiles threaten ceasefire; weekly Brent +4%
CENTCOM shoots down 2 more IRGC drones threatening Hormuz maritime traffic (June 7) — second consecutive day, no US strike on Iranian territory
Trump: only lift sanctions if Iran 'behaves' after deal; won't unfreeze assets before deal done; Bessent redirect plan continues
IRGC statement: targeted 'source of acts of aggression against Lebanese civilians'; warns 'broader response encompassing all US and Israeli targets'
